news.t: Surprising Analyst 12-Month Target For EZM The WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Fund ETF
Implied WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Fund ETF Analyst Target Price: $45
Analysts Predict 17% Upside For The Holdings Of The WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Fund ETF
How The Pieces Add Up: The WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Earnings Fund ETF Targets $45

holdings.infoBox: EZM is an equity ETF with a total of 508 individual holdings. The top holdings are Viatris stock at 1.39%, TD SYNNEX at 0.83%, CF Industries Holdings at 0.82%, Sterling Infrastructure at 0.74%, and RenaissanceRe Holdings at 0.73%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. MidCap Fund (EZM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree U.S. MidCap index. The fund tracks an earnings-focused index of US mid-cap stocks. EZM was launched on Feb 23, 2007 and is issued by WisdomTree.
